hooks.command: repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.claude/hooks/run-hook.sh" worktree-guard.sh
repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.claude/hooks/run-hook.sh" pre-edit-guard.sh
repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.claude/hooks/run-hook.sh" post-edit-guard.sh
repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.claude/hooks/run-hook.sh" prompt-guard.sh
